description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched hip roof with two distinct color sections, one a muted red and the other a light beige, creating a visually striking contrast. The structure is rectangular with a wraparound wooden veranda, enclosed by a simple horizontal railing. The roof extends well beyond the walls, providing ample shade and protection to the veranda below. The exterior walls are set back from the edge of the roof, emphasizing the prominence of the overhang and the open, airy feel of the porch. The building appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with a tiled or shingled roof, and likely includes glass windows and doors, though these are not clearly visible in the images. The overall design is functional and inviting, suitable for residential use in a suburban or park-like urban setting.
description: A rectangular bungalow with a wide, two-tone hip roof and a wraparound wooden veranda, featuring a prominent overhang and simple horizontal railings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the left and rear sides of the bungalow, showing the two-tone roof and the wraparound veranda with its wooden railings.
description_view_1: The front and left sides are visible, emphasizing the main entrance area and the full length of the veranda along the front facade.
description_view_2: The right and rear sides are shown, with the roof's red section dominating and the veranda wrapping around the corner.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the front and right sides, displaying the main approach to the bungalow and the open veranda area.
